name: Tri-Color Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake lengthwise into 4 equal layers.
2. Spread chocolate ice cream on 2 of the layers.
3. Spread raspberry sherbet on the remaining 2 layers.
4. Stack the layers on a serving platter, beginning with chocolate and alternating sherbet. Freeze for several hours or overnight.
5. Fold almond extract into whipped cream.
6. Frost the sides of the cake with whipped cream.
7. Decorate the top and bottom edges of the cake with whipped cream piped through a decorator tube.
8. Return the cake to the freezer until the cream is firm, at least 1 hour.
